title: Backend Engineer
description: Who are we? Our business is technology, food and retail. We are a young team that combines all resources with technology; Our goal is to provide an excellent e-commerce service to meet your needs. In short, you can call us Migros One. 😉 Today, as a team that holds the “Great Place To Work” certificate with the contributions of our employees we produce, learn and develop together. We rediscover our passion for our business every day and build Migros One culture together. Our Culture We are #ONE to create a better tomorrow for our community. Our way of working includes four core values that we strive to act: 1. Take accountability with passion 2. Drive innovation with curiosity 3. Make a difference for our customers 4. Create open communication We live these values every day and create an environment where everyone enjoys working. Our business culture based on trust, openness and innovation has been recognized with our “Great Place To Work” certificate! What Do We Do? As Migros One; We spread happiness in being the pioneer of innovation in the field of food and retail technology with our brands Migros Sanal Market, Migros Hemen, Migros Extra, Migros Yemek, Macroonline, Tazedirekt, Mion and Petimo! Our determination to find fast and effective solutions always keeps us one step ahead. Our team's passion and energy make their jobs enjoyable. Thanks to our people-oriented approach, we aim to create a more comfortable and practical world for everyone by using them all. We constantly strive to provide the best experience to our consumers and employees!As Migros One team, we get excited with every member of our team creating his/her own career story! If you would like to be a part of this visionary and tech-savvy e-commerce team, don’t wait! Make your application! We are looking for Backend Engineer who will be on our team. What You'll Be Doing: Contributing the software development lifecycle. (technical design, implementation, testing, deployment, monitoring) Collaborate with cross-functional teams. Develop and maintain scalable and reliable backend systems. Monitor and optimize system performance. What You'll Bring: Minimum 4 years of experience as a back-end engineer, Production experience with Java and Spring Boot Hands-on experience with OOP, Design Patterns and TDD Hands-on experience with microservice architecture Experience with Restful API design Familiar with event-driven systems and technologies (SQS, Apache Kafka) AWS, Docker, Kubernetes knowledge is nice-to-have

title: Full Stack Java Developer (Banking)
description: Would you like to perform rewarding work while contributing to the success of an established, growing company? We are looking for a Full Stack Java Developer with banking sector experience to work on innovative digital banking solutions. Qualifications: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Engineering, Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related field. Minimum 3 years of full-stack development experience, preferably in the banking sector. Strong Java, Spring Framework, and front-end framework skills. Familiarity with Docker, AWS, MSSQL, PostgreSQL. Good understanding of data modeling and integration. Strong communication skills, teamwork, and analytical thinking. Responsibilities: Design, develop, and maintain banking-related software solutions. Implement Java applications with Spring Framework (MVC, Boot, Data), JPA, Hibernate, and SQL. Develop responsive front-end components using React and/or Vue.js with JavaScript/TypeScript. Integrate back-end web services via REST and SOAP. Apply design patterns and microservices architecture. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver secure and compliant banking applications. Ability to approach AI with curiosity and intention, actively incorporating AI-powered tools into workflows to enhance productivity and drive innovation. OBSS is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We make recruiting decisions without regard to race, color, religion, national or ethnic origin, age, gender, sexual orientation, marital status, veteran status or disability status. https://medium.com/codable

title: Full Stack Developer +4
description: İş Tanımı Şirketimiz bünyesinde yürütülen uluslararası ve/veya yurt içi projelerde görev alacak, deneyimli ve yetkin takım arkadaşları aramaktayız. Genel Nitelikler Bilgisayar Mühendisliği, Yazılım Mühendisliği veya ilgili bölümlerden mezun, İyi seviyede İngilizce okuma, yazma ve anlama becerisine sahip, Uluslararası veya yurt içi projelerde çalışma deneyimi bulunan, Ankara’da ikamet eden veya edebilecek , Yurt içi ve yurt dışı seyahat engeli bulunmayan, Kişi güvenlik belgesi alınmasına engel herhangi bir durumu bulunmayan. Teknik Deneyim ve Yetkinlikler A. Aranan Yetkinlikler En az 4 yıl yazılım geliştirme deneyimine sahip, Java Spring Framework (Spring Boot, Spring Cloud, Spring Security) ve Eksen Framework konularında tecrübeli, Angular, PrimeNG ve TypeScript ile frontend geliştirme deneyimi olan, Veri yapıları, nesne yönelimli tasarım ve programlama konularında bilgi sahibi, MongoDB ve PostgreSQL ile veritabanı tasarımı konusunda deneyimli, Mikroservis mimarisi , web servisleri ve Sürekli Entegrasyon (CI) süreçlerinde deneyim sahibi, Kafka ve RabbitMQ gibi mesajlaşma sistemleri hakkında bilgi sahibi, Yazılım mimarileri konusunda bilgi sahibi, Yazılım konfigürasyon ve kalite yönetimi süreçlerine hâkim, REST API ve JSON tabanlı uygulama geliştirme konusunda tecrübeli. B. Tercih Edilen Yetkinlikler Tercihen Kovan altyapısı konusunda deneyiminin olması, Docker ve Kubernetes ile geliştirme deneyimi olan, CSS ve Bootstrap ile arayüz geliştirme deneyimi bulunan, QueryDSL tecrübesine sahip, Git, DOORS, JIRA, Jenkins, Nexus, Harbor gibi yazılım yaşam döngüsü araçlarını kullanabilen, ArgoCD hakkında bilgi sahibi, Agile / Scrum metodolojileri konusunda deneyimli.

title: Full Stack Developer (Next.js / Node.js)
description: Location: Remote / Turkey-based Project Stage: Post-Investment / Scaling to MVP About the Role We are a fast-growing SaaS startup revolutionizing the e-export and Print-on-Demand (POD) landscape. Having recently secured a significant investment round, we are rapidly moving towards our Q2 MVP launch and our full commercial release on July 1st. We are looking for a visionary Senior Full Stack Developer to join our core team—alongside our founders and lead developers—to help build, scale, and automate the future of global e-commerce. As an early member of the engineering team, you will have a direct impact on the architecture and product direction of a platform designed to empower Etsy sellers and global exporters through advanced automation and AI-driven content management. What You Will Do Develop end-to-end, high-performance, and scalable SaaS features using Next.js (React) and Node.js . Architect and optimize complex backend workflows and automation pipelines using n8n . Design and manage our database schema and real-time data layers on Supabase . Implement and maintain robust third-party integrations, with a primary focus on the Etsy API and social media automation. Manage deployment cycles and CI/CD processes on Vercel to ensure rapid, high-quality releases. Collaborate closely with the founder and the engineering team. Requirements Proven experience as a Full Stack Developer, ideally within a startup or SaaS environment. Deep expertise in the modern JavaScript/TypeScript ecosystem, with a strong focus on Next.js and Node.js . Strong proficiency in relational databases and SQL (PostgreSQL/Supabase experience is a major plus). Experience building and consuming RESTful APIs and managing complex third-party integrations. Hands-on experience with Vercel and modern cloud deployment strategies. A proactive, problem-solving mindset with the ability to work autonomously in a fast-paced environment. Bonus Points Prior experience with n8n or other low-code/no-code automation platforms.● Knowledge of e-commerce business logic, Print-on-Demand workflows, or the Etsy marketplace. Experience in early-stage startups and scaling products from 0 to 1. What We Offer The opportunity to be part of a high-potential startup at a critical growth stage. A highly technical and collaborative work environment with a focus on automation and cutting-edge tools. Flexible working conditions and the chance to shape the technical culture of the company.

title: Full Stack Developers
description: We are Hiring Full-Stack Developers We are a rapidly growing Fintech company looking to expand our technical team. We are currently seeking 3 talented Full-Stack Developers to help us build and scale our financial systems. 💻 Our Tech Stack: 🔸 Backend: Node.js / Python / PHP (Laravel) 🔸 Frontend: React / Next.js / Angular 🔸 Databases: MySQL / PostgreSQL / Redis 🔸 Message Brokers: RabbitMQ / Kafka Key Requirements: Location: Kağıthane, Istanbul (100% On-site – no remote/hybrid options available) Job Type: Full-time Deep understanding of RESTful API architecture, web security concepts, and proficiency in Git. Bonus Points (Nice to have): ✔️ Previous experience in Fintech, financial projects, or trading systems. ✔️ Experience with Docker and CI/CD pipelines. ✔️ Familiarity with AI-assisted development ("Vibe Coding") and modern AI IDEs like Cursor or AntiGravity. 💵 Salary: Highly competitive and negotiable based on your experience and skill level

title: Senior Frontend Engineer (React)
description: The digital entertainment and iGaming world is entering a new era, driven by rapidly evolving technology and changing user expectations. This shift demands not only strong brands, but also integrated structures capable of leading them under a unified strategy. This is the vision that inspired the creation of NGAMING. Established in 2026 under Doğan Online (DOL), NGAMING is a next-generation group structure bringing together leading brands in digital entertainment and iGaming under one shared mission and strategy. We built NGAMING to be integrated, sustainable, and collectively stronger, enabling brands to grow not individually, but together. Today, through Nesine, atyarışı.com and Liderform, we move forward not only with our individual achievements but as an integrated structure aligned around a common goal. The driving force behind this vision in technology and software is our company, D Yazılım Teknoloji A.Ş. Join a team full of life and become an essential player! Create groundbreaking projects, build new digital worlds, and make your mark! Surprise your competitors with strategic moves, inspire with your speed, and always pass the ball to your team! If you're looking for a tech-driven, innovative, and exciting career where every moment is full of energy and opportunity, you're in the right place. Join NGAMING — and rewrite the game! Full-of-Life Qualities Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field. 5+ years of professional experience in JavaScript development, with deep expertise in React (Hooks). Strong experience with Context API and/or Redux for state management. Solid experience working with RESTful APIs. Proven ability to design and develop scalable, reusable, and high-performance frontend architectures. Strong knowledge of JavaScript package managers (Yarn, npm). Hands-on experience with build and bundling tools such as Webpack, Babel, or similar. Strong focus on performance optimization, clean code, and semantic HTML/CSS. Practical understanding of micro frontend and monorepo architectures. A good knowledge of Node.js, SSR & Socket.io. Strong knowledge of frontend monitoring and observability, with hands-on experience using tools such as Sentry, New Relic, etc. for error tracking, performance monitoring and production analysis. Strong awareness of consistent user experience (UX/UI) principles. Extensive experience using Bitbucket for version control (Experience with GitHub or GitLab is considered a plus). Strong advocate of testing and clean code practices ( Hands-on experience with Jest, Testing Library, ESLint, and similar tools). Experience with component-driven development and Storybook / atomic design systems. Experience working with frontend applications deployed on AWS (e.g., S3, CloudFront, CDN strategies, environment-based deployments). Experience building and maintaining large-scale, high-traffic web applications. Comfortable working in Agile / Scrum teams and cross-functional environments. Strong understanding of software engineering best practices across the full SDLC. Strong architectural thinking, problem-solving, and communication skills. Proactive, ownership-driven, and capable of mentoring other team members. A Full Look on the Job Description Own the development, maintenance, and optimization of complex frontend features and applications. Take responsibility throughout the full product lifecycle: design, development, release, and long-term maintenance. Lead and contribute to frontend architectural decisions. Contribute to and improve AWS-based frontend deployment and release processes. Ensure high standards of performance, scalability, security, and code quality. Actively participate in and lead code reviews, providing constructive and high-quality feedback. Support knowledge sharing, technical guidance, and mentoring within the frontend team. Collaborate closely with Product, Design, Backend, and DevOps teams. Continuously evaluate new technologies and propose improvements to existing systems. Build high-performance frontend applications serving millions of users. Full-of-Life Benefits: “Employee benefits” but it’s also known as “Full-of-Life Benefits” in the world of NGAMING🙂 Private health insurance with unlimited coverage extending to spouse and children, A multinet restaurant ticket, Transportation benefits on office working days, In addition to annual leave days, you have three Won’t Make It Today 🙂 days, which you can use whenever you like (we simply call this BAY 🙂) An additional one-day birthday leave to redeem on any day during your birthday week, Gift vouchers on holidays, Gifts on special occasions, including marriage and child birth, Shop as you wish throughout the year with gift transfers to your Digital Wallet! Follow NGAMING on LinkedIn to discover our high-spirited, full-of-life team! Bu ilan sebebiyle yapacağınız başvurular aracılığıyla toplanacak kişisel verileriniz veri sorumluları NGAMING markası grup şirketleri D Elektronik Şans Oyunları ve Yayıncılık A.Ş., 4 Race Teknoloji ve Yazılım A.Ş., D Yazılım Teknoloji A.Ş., Liderform At Yarışları Enformasyon Anonim Şirketi tarafından 6698 sayılı Kişisel Verilerin Korunması Kanunu ve ilgili mevzuat kapsamında iş başvuru süreçlerinin yürütülmesi amacıyla işlenecektir. Kişisel verilerinize ve haklarınıza ilişkin detaylı bilgi için lütfen Çalışan Adayı Aydınlatma Metnimizi inceleyiniz.

title: Back-End/Infra Engineer (Kubernetes / Node.js)
description: Who We Are Is What We Do. Deel is the all-in-one payroll and HR platform for global teams. Our vision is to unlock global opportunity for every person, team, and business. Built for the way the world works today, Deel combines HRIS, payroll, compliance, benefits, performance, and equipment management into one seamless platform. With AI-powered tools and a fully owned payroll infrastructure, Deel supports every worker type in 150+ countries—helping businesses scale smarter, faster, and more compliantly. Among the largest globally distributed companies in the world, our team of 7,000 spans more than 100 countries, speaks 74 languages, and brings a connected and dynamic culture that drives continuous learning and innovation for our customers. Why should you be part of our success story? As the fastest-growing Software as a Service (SaaS) company in history, Deel is transforming how global talent connects with world-class companies – breaking down borders that have traditionally limited both hiring and career opportunities. We're not just building software; we're creating the infrastructure for the future of work, enabling a more diverse and inclusive global economy. In 2024 alone, we paid $11.2 billion to workers in nearly 100 currencies and provided healthcare and benefits to workers in 109 countries—ensuring people get paid and protected, no matter where they are. Our momentum is reflected in our achievements and customer satisfaction: CNBC Disruptor 50, Forbes Cloud 100, Deloitte Fast 500, and repeated recognition on Y Combinator’s top companies list – all while maintaining a 4.83 average rating from 15,000 reviews across G2, Trustpilot, Captera, Apple and Google. Your experience at Deel will be a career accelerator. At the forefront of the global work revolution, you'll tackle complex challenges that impact millions of people's working lives. With our momentum—backed by a $17.3 billion valuation and $1 B in Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) in just over five years—you'll drive meaningful impact while building expertise that makes you a sought-after leader in the transformation of global work. Get ready to: Be a part of a truly cross-functional team Participate in product planning (From discovery all the way to deployment); We want your input at all stages of the Software Development Lifecycle! Collaborate! Our teams work together to develop robust new features, API’s, continuously improve our industry-leading products and find and fix any bugs at Deel Speed. Ensure our customers receive a white-glove experience with our products! What The Giger Team Does The Giger team builds and maintains one of Deel’s most powerful internal platforms: a sandbox system that enables engineers to develop, test, and deploy faster than ever. Giger allows product teams to spin up fully functional, production-like environments in minutes, complete with real databases, services, queues, and storage. Each sandbox is completely isolated, empowering teams to experiment freely, test infrastructure changes, and validate code safely at scale. Who We’re Looking For 8+ years of experience in Software Engineering, Infrastructure or Platform Engineering Strong BE engineering skills: API design, Postgres, Kafka/Nats Node.js/Go/Python background Experience with AWS/GCP/Azure Advanced experience with Kubernetes, including creating tools, controllers, or operators that extend its capabilities Experience with all the standard Kubernetes tools: networking (ingress controllers, CoreDNS, external-dns, AWS LBC, oauth2-proxy) secret management (Vault, External Secrets) cluster autoscaling and resource tuning (Karpenter, VPA, goldilocks, KEDA) storage provisioning Experience with Helm charts and GitOps Experience working with and maintaining large k8s clusters: 1000 nodes, 30k+ pods Excellent system design and problem-solving skills Strong communication and collaboration abilities across multiple teams Hands-on mindset, comfortable working in complex and evolving environments What You’ll Do Design, build, and maintain the control plane that powers hundreds of dynamic developer sandboxes Develop backend tooling and services that automate sandbox creation, orchestration, and lifecycle management Productize and provide infra as a platform including DBs, caches, object storage and queueing systems Scale & tune the cluster to provide capacity for volatile workloads. You’ll become hands on with Karpenter/VPA/KEDA policies, right-sizing, pod density, bin-packing, and scheduling strategies for diverse, bursty workloads Constantly track and optimize costs to be efficient. At our k8s scale all tiny decisions matter, from compute to storage and data transfer Own the networking setup to mimic what we have in Production but pair it with greater DevEx at scale of hundreds of sandboxes - traffic routing and interception, ingress tuning, serving assets Implement and evolve observability within sandboxes Partner with Sandboxes SRE team to ensure uptime and reliability of hundreds of sandboxes daily Work with Deel engineering to improve their DevEx and productize day to day needs into self-service platform Extra Brownie Points If You… Have built internal developer platforms (in-house or with tools like Okteto, Gitpod, Crafting) or Kubernetes operators Have production experience with Postgres Operators, e.g. CloudNativePG or Zalando Have multi-region and multi-cloud experience Total Rewards Our workforce deserves fair and competitive pay that meets them where they are. With scalable benefits, rewards, and perks, our total rewards programs reflect our commitment to inclusivity and access for all. Some things you’ll enjoy Stock grant opportunities dependent on your role, employment status and location Additional perks and benefits based on your employment status and country The flexibility of remote work, including optional WeWork access At Deel, we’re an equal-opportunity employer that values diversity and positively encourage applications from suitably qualified and eligible candidates regardless of race, religion, sex, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, disability status, pregnancy or maternity or other applicable legally protected characteristics. Unless otherwise agreed, we will communicate with job applicants using Deel-specific emails, which include @ deel.com and other acquired company emails like @ payspace.com and @ paygroup.com . You can view the most up-to-date job listings at Deel by visiting our careers page . Deel is an equal-opportunity employer and is committed to cultivating a diverse and inclusive workplace that reflects different abilities, backgrounds, beliefs, experiences, identities and perspectives. Deel will provide accommodations on request throughout the recruitment, selection and assessment process for applicants with disabilities. If you require accommodations, please inform our Talent Acquisition Team via this link and a team member will be in touch to ensure your equal participation. If you have difficulty accessing the form, please email at recruiting@deel.com. As part of our hiring process, we primarily rely on interviews and role-related assessments. In limited cases, we may also consider informal background information relevant to the role, in line with our privacy and fairness obligations. This application process does utilise Automated Employment Decision Tools (AEDT) and AI systems to assist in evaluating candidates based on experience level, technical skills and qualifications. As a fully remote company, we also utilise AI-powered deepfake and fraud detection technologies to verify the authenticity of candidate identities and interactions during assessments and interviews. This processing is conducted in compliance with applicable Data Protection, AI Governance and Labour Laws. We ensure human oversight is maintained in all final hiring decisions. Your personal data is not used to train AI models. For more information on how we process your personal data, please see our Privacy Policy. For NYC Residents: In accordance with NYC Local Law 144, an independent bias audit has been conducted on AEDT; results are available at Ashby, Covey.

title: Senior Backend Engineer (Kotlin)
description: About the role We are hiring Senior Backend Engineers to join a backend platform built on Java services. Teams own their solutions end to end and operate with a high level of autonomy. Engineers are expected to contribute not only to implementation but also to design, testing strategy, and long term operability. What you will do Design, build, and maintain backend services using Java and Spring Boot Design and Implement event driven and synchronous integrations using Kafka and HTTP APIs, using the most appropriate design patterns based on system needs. Own services through their full lifecycle including production support and maintenance Apply test driven development practices including unit and integration testing Contribute to story refinement, acceptance criteria, and technical design discussions Ensure observability, monitoring, and performance considerations are built in from day one Work across a mixed estate of legacy and modern services, improving and evolving existing systems Use infrastructure as code to support deployment and operational needs Essential skills Strong Java and Kotlin backend engineering experience with Spring Boot Proven experience building microservices and distributed systems deployed to cloud hosting platforms. Hands on experience with Kafka in production systems Solid experience with SQL and NoSQL databases such as MongoDB, Redis, PostgreSQL, and DynamoDB Strong experience with infrastructure as code approaches. Practical experience applying TDD, including unit testing and integration testing Strong understanding of service lifecycle, observability, and production support Ability to work autonomously and deliver with minimal supervision Strong communication skills and experience working in collaborative agile teams Agile environment experience Extensive experience with CI/CD Nice to have Behaviour driven development (BDD) Experience improving performance and resilience in distributed systems Familiarity with modern Java features such as virtual threads OpenAPI and design-by-contract approaches Team and ways of working Two week sprint cadence with standard agile ceremonies No dedicated scrum master, shared ownership across the team Engineers actively participate in design, refinement, and mentoring Engineers are expected to collaborate, ask for help early, and avoid working in isolation

title: AI-Enabled Full Stack Python Developer
description: Orion Innovation is a premier, award-winning, global business and technology services firm. Orion delivers game-changing business transformation and product development rooted in digital strategy, experience design, and engineering, with a unique combination of agility, scale, and maturity. We work with a wide range of clients across many industries including financial services, professional services, telecommunications and media, consumer products, automotive, industrial automation, professional sports and entertainment, life sciences, ecommerce, and education. AI-Enabled Full Stack Python Developer About the Role We are looking for a hands-on AI-enabled Full Stack Python Developer to design and build data-driven applications enhanced with modern AI/LLM capabilities. This role combines strong software engineering fundamentals with rapid prototyping, AI integration, and business problem solving. You will work closely with cross-functional teams to develop scalable solutions, build internal tools, and deliver high-impact applications leveraging the latest AI technologies. Key Responsibilities Develop and maintain full stack applications with a strong focus on Python backend and lightweight frontends Build AI-powered solutions using LLMs (e.g., OpenAI / Azure OpenAI) and prompt engineering techniques Design and develop user interfaces using tools like Streamlit or similar frameworks Integrate with APIs, databases, and external systems Translate business requirements into practical, scalable technical solutions Ensure code quality through testing, debugging, and best engineering practices Collaborate with stakeholders to iterate quickly and deliver value in an agile environment Leverage AI-assisted development tools to enhance productivity and code quality Required Qualifications Minimum 3 years of professional experience in software development Strong proficiency in Python Experience in full stack development (backend + frontend fundamentals) Experience with data processing libraries (e.g., Pandas, NumPy) Hands-on experience with REST APIs and JSON-based integrations Familiarity with LLM concepts and prompt engineering Experience with OpenAI / Azure OpenAI or similar AI platforms Basic knowledge of SQL and/or NoSQL databases Experience with Git and modern development workflows Strong problem-solving and debugging skills Preferred Qualifications Experience with Streamlit or similar rapid UI frameworks Familiarity with LangChain or similar LLM orchestration tools Understanding of testing frameworks (pytest, unittest) Exposure to CI/CD pipelines Basic knowledge of financial, tax, or accounting domains Experience with AI-assisted coding tools, such as: GitHub Copilot Factory.ai CodeX ClaudeCode What We’re Looking For A builder mindset who enjoys rapid prototyping and iteration Ability to work with ambiguity and evolving requirements Strong communication and collaboration skills Curiosity for emerging AI technologies and continuous learning Ownership and accountability in delivering high-quality solutions Orion is an equal opportunity employer, and all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, creed, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, pregnancy, age, national origin, citizenship status, disability status, genetic information, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law. Candidate Privacy Policy Orion Systems Integrators, LLC And Its Subsidiaries And Its Affiliates (collectively, “Orion,” “we” Or “us”) Are Committed To Protecting Your Privacy. This Candidate Privacy Policy (orioninc.com) (“Notice”) Explains What information we collect during our application and recruitment process and why we collect it; How we handle that information; and How to access and update that information. Your use of Orion services is governed by any applicable terms in this notice and our general Privacy Policy.

title: React Native Developer (Mobile Apps - Onsite)
description: At SevenApps, we build mobile apps that millions of users carry in their pockets every day. Our portfolio across lifestyle, productivity, and utility categories has racked up 20M+ downloads, high ratings, and continues to grow. Continuous improvement isn't a slogan for us: it's how the work actually gets done. We're looking for a new React Native Developer to join our crew. About the Role As a React Native Developer, you'll build, improve, and extend the mobile apps across SevenApps' portfolio with new features. Modular components, clean code, and a seamless mobile experience sit at the core of this role. You'll be part of our 5-person React Native team. Our stack: React Native, Expo SDK, Expo Router, TypeScript, Zustand, TanStack Query, NativeWind/Tailwind v4, and Firebase. What You'll Do Build pixel-perfect mobile UIs for iOS and Android, fully aligned with product designs Develop modular, reusable components that work across our entire portfolio Diagnose and resolve bugs across our mobile apps Collaborate with the team and stakeholders to drive strategic goals, What We're Looking For Must-have 1+ year of React Native production experience Strong knowledge of React Native, JavaScript, and mobile development best practices Depth in React Custom Hooks and Context API Solid grasp of REST APIs, request/response patterns, and offline storage Proficiency with Git and version control Detail-oriented with an inventive approach to problem-solving and debugging Nice-to-have Experience with Expo managed projects Experience with Tailwind CSS State management with Zustand Experience with TanStack Query Work Setup This is a full-time, on-site position based at our 4. Levent, Istanbul office. Our Team & Vibe We're a hustle-and-ownership obsessed, hands-on team building in 4. Levent. No dress code, no performative formality; just focused work, fast iteration, and people who care about the craft. Our office is built for focus: quiet corners when you need to go deep, open space when you want to riff with teammates. Unlimited sugar-free and healthy snacks, specialty coffee, and yes, oat milk. We take the "snacks & cozy office" thing seriously. Your ideas ship to production, not into a backlog. Benefits Competitive net salary & private health insurance: Clear and reliable financial and health coverage. Learning budget ($100/month): Use it for courses, content, or any resources that support your growth. AI-augmented development workflow: We cover the cost of all AI tools (Cursor, ChatGPT, Claude) you use to improve your productivity. Quarterly team experiences: Thoughtfully designed events that bring the team together. MultiSport membership: Sta y active with access to gyms and various sports facilities. Hiring Process HR Interview — 30 min, Google Meet Technical Case — 1 week to complete Online Team Lead Interview — 30 min, Google Meet On-site Technical Interview — ~2 hours at our 4. Levent office Offer We aim to keep the process efficient and stay in touch with candidates moving forward through the interview stages.
